body:
Jordan, thanks for the follow-up and for sharing those updated unit economics — the trajectory on compute cost per inference is genuinely impressive and addresses the concern I raised in our last call. I've had a chance to loop in my colleague at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) who covers the infrastructure layer, and we're both aligned that [NovaMind](orgs/novamind-ai) is operating in exactly the wedge we want exposure to at the seed stage. I'd like to move toward a partner meeting in the next two to three weeks if your timeline allows — can you confirm whether the round is still targeting a close before year-end? In the meantime, it would help to see your current cap table and any existing commitments from angels or other leads so we can think through fit and allocation. Looking forward to continuing the conversation.

Amara
